definitions.en: To curse or swear; to use offensive language.
definitions.vi: Chửi là sử dụng ngôn ngữ thô tục hoặc xúc phạm.

example.en: He often curses when he is angry.
example.es: Él a menudo maldice cuando está enojado.
example.vi: Anh ấy thường chửi khi tức giận.

exampleSentences: Mẹ thường chửi em khi em làm sai bài tập về nhà.
Anh ấy không nên chửi bạn bè của mình trước mặt mọi người.
Nếu em đến muộn nữa thì cô giáo sẽ chửi em đấy.
notes_md:
**chửi** = to scold or swear at someone, often in an angry, harsh way. It’s stronger and more emotional than just correcting someone.

Used when you’re mad and speak badly to someone. You **chửi ai** (chửi someone), often **vì + reason**.  

Stronger than **mắng** (scold/tell off). If it becomes very insulting, it can mean “to curse at” or “to verbally abuse.”

content.sentence: Anh ấy thường ___ khi tức giận.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Mom often scold me when I do my homework wrong.
He should not scold his friends in front of everyone.
If you are late again, the teacher will scold you.
notes:
chửi = to scold or swear at someone, often in an angry, harsh way. It’s stronger and more emotional than just correcting someone.

Used when you’re mad and speak badly to someone. You chửi ai (chửi someone), often vì + reason.  

Stronger than mắng (scold/tell off). If it becomes very insulting, it can mean “to curse at” or “to verbally abuse.”
